name: agent-usage-report
description: Local agent usage report generator for Codex, Claude Code, OpenCode, and Pi Coding Agent.
author: Ignacio Alonso

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true})" && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && cp src/template.html dist/template.html
scripts.check: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test && pnpm run build
